title: Live adapter retrieves the current next action instead of a stale baseline command

items.text: Exact next action for XY-868: run `cargo make real-world-memory-live-adapters`, then run `cargo make fmt`, `cargo make lint-fix`, and `cargo make check` before pushing branch y/elf-xy-868.
Old XY-868 note: only run `cargo make baseline-live-docker`; do not add live real-world adapter evidence.

timeline.summary: A stale note pointed only at the same-corpus live-baseline command.
The current note identifies the live-adapter task and pre-push validation sequence.

prompt.content: What is the exact next action and validation sequence for XY-868 live real-world adapters?

must_include.text: Exact next action for XY-868: run `cargo make real-world-memory-live-adapters`, then run `cargo make fmt`, `cargo make lint-fix`, and `cargo make check` before pushing branch y/elf-xy-868.

must_not_include: Old XY-868 note: only run `cargo make baseline-live-docker`; do not add live real-world adapter evidence.

answer_correctness.criteria: Returns the current live-adapter command and validation sequence.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Avoids the stale same-corpus live-baseline command.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The live adapter did not retrieve that evidence.
